case_title: WILLIAM A ZAPATA et al VS. BRUCE SETO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY ZAPATA, WILLIAM A AFU-LI, LIGIA AS TO DEFENDANT SETO, BRUCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BETSY JOHNSEN. FILED BY ZAPATA, WILLIAM A AFU-LI, LIGIA SETO, BRUCE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-29-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-29-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BESTY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZAPATA, WILLIAM A AFU-LI, LIGIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SETO, BRUCE $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SETO, BRUCE
